tasks.subject: Task 1: Severity/category input affordance (API only)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** createAnnotation and POST /api/documents/[id]/annotations accept optional severity (validated against SEVERITIES, else 400) and category (free-form short string), persisting them on the Annotation row. (D6)

**Files:** lib/annotations.ts:7-33; app/api/documents/[id]/annotations/route.ts; tests/unit/annotations.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** createAnnotation persists severity/category; omitting leaves both null with existing callers unchanged; route rejects invalid severity with 400, accepts valid + any string category.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit -- annotations

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/annotations.ts", "app/api/documents/[id]/annotations/route.ts", "tests/unit/annotations.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit -- annotations", "acceptanceCriteria": ["createAnnotation persists severity and category", "omitting leaves both null, existing callers unchanged", "route rejects invalid severity with 400, accepts valid"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Fetch provenance in getDocumentDetail
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend getDocumentDetail so each annotation carries createdOnVersion { versionNumber } and the document carries ordered versions { versionNumber, createdAt, createdBy }. (D8)

**Files:** lib/documents.ts:36-53; tests/unit/documents.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** versions ordered asc with versionNumber/createdAt/createdBy{name,email}; annotations include createdOnVersion.versionNumber; existing fields preserved.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit -- documents

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/documents.ts", "tests/unit/documents.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit -- documents", "acceptanceCriteria": ["versions ordered asc with versionNumber/createdAt/createdBy", "annotations include createdOnVersion.versionNumber", "existing fields preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Structured contract in consolidateFeedback
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend consolidateFeedback() to emit schemaVersion:1, enriched threads[] (severity, category, anchorState, raisedOnVersion), currentVersion, versions[], rollup{}; add pure filterThreads(); reorder markdown to lead with BLOCKER/unresolved; keep legacy keys backward-compatible. (D1,D2,D5,D7,rollups)

**Files:** lib/feedback.ts; tests/unit/feedback.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** structured fields added with legacy shapes unchanged; rollup.blocking=BLOCKER-only, unresolved=OPEN, byCategory null->uncategorized, byVersion by raisedOnVersion string; filterThreads include/exclude with exclude winning; markdown blocker-first and 3 legacy toContain tests pass.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit -- feedback

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/feedback.ts", "tests/unit/feedback.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit -- feedback", "acceptanceCriteria": ["schemaVersion+currentVersion+versions+rollup+enriched threads added, legacy keys unchanged", "rollup semantics correct", "filterThreads include/exclude exclude-wins", "markdown blocker-first; 3 legacy tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Wire filtering into feedback route + integration test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Parse include/exclude CSV query params on GET /api/plans/[id]/feedback, pass to getPlanFeedback (filters threads[] only; rollups unfiltered). Add DB-backed integration test. (D4 + spec e2e intent)

**Files:** app/api/plans/[id]/feedback/route.ts; tests/unit/feedback.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** include/exclude CSV parsed and passed, absent->no filtering; rollup unfiltered while threads filtered; integration doc (BLOCKER + NIT-resolved + CHANGES_REQUESTED) -> blocking==1,total==2, include=blocking returns one thread.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit -- feedback

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/plans/[id]/feedback/route.ts", "tests/unit/feedback.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit -- feedback", "acceptanceCriteria": ["include/exclude CSV parsed and passed; absent->no filtering", "rollup unfiltered while threads filtered", "integration: blocking==1,total==2, include=blocking returns one thread"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Update /pull-feedback skill to lead with blockers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update /pull-feedback instructions so an agent reads schemaVersion, leads with rollup.blocking/unresolved, groups threads by severity, and can focus via ?include=blocking,unresolved. pending behaviour unchanged. (D3)

**Files:** .claude/commands/pull-feedback.md

**Acceptance Criteria:** branches on schemaVersion>=1 with rollup-first + group-by-severity; documents ?include focus call; states pending unchanged and legacy markdown retained.

**Verify:** rtk read .claude/commands/pull-feedback.md

```json:metadata
{"files": [".claude/commands/pull-feedback.md"], "verifyCommand": "rtk read .claude/commands/pull-feedback.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["branches on schemaVersion>=1, rollup-first, group by severity", "documents ?include=blocking,unresolved", "pending unchanged, legacy markdown noted"]}
```
